title: Leetcode 2115. Find All Possible Recipes from Given Supplies
shortDescription: Given recipes whose ingredients may include other recipes and an initial set of supplies, determine which recipes can be produced; the core challenge is dependency resolution on a directed graph (topological ordering or DFS) while handling cycles and using supplies as base nodes.

Leetcode 2115. Find All Possible Recipes from Given Supplies

Given recipes whose ingredients may include other recipes and an initial set of supplies, determine which recipes can be produced; the core challenge is dependency resolution on a directed graph (topological ordering or DFS) while handling cycles and using supplies as base nodes.
